review_comment:
Curious why we have a broker,transactionHandler & algorithm callback for option assignment but not for exercise. I gave the `OptionExerciseAssignRegressionAlgorithm` a test, and the event actually **also** seems to go through the `OnOrderEvent`:
```
OrderEvent Time: 12/25/2015 05:00:00 OrderID: 4 EventID: 2 Symbol: GOOG  151224C00745000 Status: Filled Quantity: 1 FillQuantity: 1 FillPrice: 0  Message: Automatic Assignment
Assignment Time: 12/25/2015 05:00:00 OrderID: 4 EventID: 2 Symbol: GOOG  151224C00745000 Status: Filled Quantity: 1 FillQuantity: 1 FillPrice: 0  Message: Option Expired - Automatic Assignment
```
*Not really related to the objective of this PR changes, but the PR triggered me to look deeper 😁
Both of those appear to be assignment events -- this change aimed at not raising the event for exercises. The tx handler was filtering out exercise events by checking `IsAssignment == false`
